x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Discovery data is the authoritative source of CI truth for Now Assist ITOM. Stale discovery means Now Assist AI is reasoning over outdated infrastructure, producing unreliable impact analysis and alert correlation.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure a recurring discovery schedule to run at minimum weekly via discovery_schedule_list.do. Investigate MID Server health if discovery is failing. Stale discovery means Now Assist ITOM is reasoning over outdated infrastructure data.
